csharpCode: using UnityEngine; using UnityEngine.UIElements; public class Script : UnityEditor.Editor { public static string Main() { var docs = Object.FindObjectsOfType<UIDocument>(); string result = ""; foreach (var doc in docs) { if (doc.rootVisualElement == null) continue; var continueBtn = doc.rootVisualElement.Q<Button>("btn-continue"); if (continueBtn != null) { using (var evt = ClickEvent.GetPooled()) { evt.target = continueBtn; continueBtn.SendEvent(evt); } return "Clicked btn-continue"; } var allBtns = doc.rootVisualElement.Query<Button>().ToList(); foreach (var btn in allBtns) { result += btn.name + ","; } } var pm = GameObject.Find("[PlayerManager]"); if (pm != null && pm.transform.childCount > 0) return "already in game"; return "btns found: " + result; } }
